abilities.name: 프레셔
abilities.description: 상대가 사용하는 기술의 PP를 많이 줄인다.

flavorTexts.text: Only a Bisharp that stands above all others in its vast army can evolve into Kingambit.
Though it commands a massive army in battle, it’s not skilled at devising complex strategies. It just uses brute strength to keep pushing.
